# Closeout: <title>

Status: Draft
Owner: <owner>
Created: <yyyy-mm-dd>
Linked proposal: <path-or-none>
Linked spec: <path-or-none>
Linked ADR: <path-or-none>
Linked plan: <path-or-none>
Support-tier impact: <none|surface and final tier change>
Policy impact: <none|ledger or rule affected>

## What landed

Summarize the shipped work and cite commits, PRs, or artifacts.

## Evidence

List proof commands, CI runs, artifacts, or reviewer checks that validated the
work.

## Claim boundary

State what may now be claimed and what remains unsupported.

## Policy changes

List policy ledgers, exceptions, CI lanes, or support tiers that changed.

## Remaining work

List follow-up work as explicit plan items, issues, or proposals.

## Cleanup

Record generated files, stale artifacts removed, branches closed, manifests
updated, or known intentional leftovers.

## Rollback

Describe how to roll back or mitigate the landed work if needed.
